title: Bell Notifications Count - Want it to NOT disappear, but instead to adjust count based on read/unread
excerpt: Would love for Bell Notification Count to stop disappearing once opened. Would love for it to function much the same way as the update feed in that the bubble and number only reduces. Several of my coworkers have been fr…

posts.author: AF-ITM (Angel Fielder)
posts.cookedHtml: Would love for Bell Notification Count to stop disappearing once opened. Would love for it to function much the same way as the update feed in that the bubble and number only reduces. Several of my coworkers have been frustrated by the disappearing count/bubble.
